Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.filter

Class AbstractObservationFieldMatcher<T>

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.filter.AbstractObservationFieldMatcher<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IObservationFieldMatcher
Direct Known Subclasses:
BooleanFieldMatcher, DoubleFieldMatcher, SeriesTypeFieldMatcher, StringFieldMatcher
public abstract class AbstractObservationFieldMatcher<T> extends Object implements IObservationFieldMatcher
The interface for all observation field matchers.

    • AbstractObservationFieldMatcher

      public AbstractObservationFieldMatcher(T testValue, ObservationMatcherOp op, ObservationMatcherOp[] ops)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      testValue - The value against which data are to be matched.
      op - The operation to apply to the observation and test expression.
      ops - The operations associated with matchers of this type.

      public ObservationMatcherOp[] getMatcherOps()
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher

    • getValueUnderTest

      protected abstract T getValueUnderTest(ValidObservation ob)
      Get the value under test. If any conversion must first be done, e.g. from string, this method must handle that.
      Parameters:
      ob - An observation containing the value.
      Returns:
      The value to be matched against.

    • setSelectedObservationMessage

      public void setSelectedObservationMessage(ObservationSelectionMessage msg)
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      Set the observation selection message for concrete field matchers that may require additional context re: the origin of the selected observation, if any.
      Specified by:
      setSelectedObservationMessage in interface IObservationFieldMatcher
      Parameters:
      msg - The observation selection message.
